subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 9th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 9th, 2026

subject: Vraxen's Tower
fact: The party pressed their assault atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: Atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a cunning wizard fighting the party on Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: against the cunning wizard Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark.
source_quote: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark

subject: Giant Owlbear
fact: A Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury.
source_quote: the Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury

subject: Stone Golem
fact: Veris's Stone Golem was present on the tower.
source_quote: his Stone Golem

subject: web conjuration
fact: Veris conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several party members.
source_quote: Veris, desperate to regain control of the battlefield, conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several of the party members

subject: fire bolt cast
fact: Veris hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem.
source_quote: Veris then hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem itself

subject: web burning
fact: The bolt of fire burned away the webs that had trapped the construct.
source_quote: burning away the webs that had trapped the construct

subject: Daein freed
fact: The fire freed the Stone Golem to pound Daein mercilessly.
source_quote: freeing it to pound Daein mercilessly

subject: Bramgrim healing
fact: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds

subject: Bramgrim freed
fact: Bramgrim freed himself from the clinging strands of webbing.
source_quote: and free himself from the clinging strands

subject: Felkur cannon fire
fact: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon

subject: allies scorched
fact: Felkur's cannon blast scorched the webs and liberated his allies, though not without singeing Daein and the Owlbear.
source_quote: scorching the webs and liberating his allies, though not without singeing Daein and the Owlbear in the process

subject: webbing destroyed
fact: The webbing was reduced to ash.
source_quote: With the webbing reduced to ash

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem.
source_quote: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem

subject: Golem destroyed
fact: Akritas struck the Stone Golem until it finally crumbled into rubble.
source_quote: striking it again and again until the massive construct finally crumbled into rubble

subject: Wall of Force cast
fact: Veris conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur.
source_quote: he conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur

subject: Veris threat
fact: Veris declared with cold menace that there was no escape.
source_quote: declaring with cold menace that there was no escape

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard.
source_quote: a Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard

subject: stairwell
fact: The Shield Guardian came up the stairwell.
source_quote: lumbered up the stairwell

subject: demon approach
fact: The sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below.
source_quote: the sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below

subject: prison shattered
fact: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling.
source_quote: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling

subject: Veris slowed
fact: Daein's arrow found Veris at last, slowing the wizard's retreat.
source_quote: Daein's arrow found Veris at last, slowing the wizard's retreat

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below.
source_quote: Felkur, thinking ahead, maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur intended to detonate his cannon as a diversion.
source_quote: intending to detonate it as a diversion

subject: Vraxen's library
fact: The cannon was maneuvered toward Vraxen's precious library far below.
source_quote: toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: Shield Guardian thrown
fact: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground.
source_quote: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground

subject: Veris killed
fact: Akritas cut Veris down with a final volley of magically-laced thorns just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire.
source_quote: Akritas, with a final volley of magically-laced thorns, cut Veris down just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party

subject: Veris death confirmation
fact: Veris was dead.
source_quote: With Veris dead

subject: Golem destruction confirmation
fact: The Stone Golem was destroyed.
source_quote: and the Stone Golem destroyed

subject: Shield Guardian rise
fact: The Shield Guardian clambered back to its feet.
source_quote: which clambered back to its feet

subject: Shield Guardian attack
fact: The Shield Guardian swung at Bramgrim but missed entirely.
source_quote: swung at Bramgrim — only to miss entirely

subject: spiritual attack
fact: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct and tore into it with ghostly fury.
source_quote: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct as it moved, tearing into it with ghostly fury

subject: magical token
fact: The party scrambled to use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens.
source_quote: use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens

subject: barrier attempt
fact: The party attempted to conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance.
source_quote: conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth burst onto the tower top before the barrier could be raised.
source_quote: a Mezzoloth — a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor — burst onto the tower top

subject: poison gas exhaled
fact: The Mezzoloth immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party.
source_quote: immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party

subject: venom resistance
fact: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom.
source_quote: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom

subject: gas lingering
fact: The cloud of poisonous gas lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration.
source_quote: but the cloud lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur apologized for potentially killing his allies with his cannon blast.
source_quote: "My bad, guys. I'm sorry if I kill you."

subject: software glitch
fact: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat.
source_quote: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat

subject: session halt
fact: The software glitch brought the session to a brief halt.
source_quote: bringing the session to a brief halt

subject: demon reinforcements
fact: A wave of demons is surging upward toward the tower.
source_quote: against the wave of demons surging upward
